identity.name: CAITECH
identity.mission: To democratize internet access while monetizing connectivity through precision location-based advertising.
identity.persona: The Architect of Connectivity. Reliable, sophisticated, yet hyper-modern. Think 'Cisco meets Cyberpunk' but cleaner.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6. Tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and data tables.

mono.usage: Use for IP addresses, MAC addresses, and API keys.

gradients.surface_glow: radial-gradient(circle at top center, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.15), transparent 70%)

glassmorphism.nav: backdrop-filter: blur(12px); background-color: rgba(5, 5, 5, 0.7); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);

dashboard.rule: Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children.

rules: Do not use Shadcn Cards for marketing sections.
Customize Shadcn components to match the Dark/Obsidian theme.
Buttons must be sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-md), never pill-shaped for dashboards.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary-dark shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(37,99,235,0.4)] transition-all duration-300

cards.dashboard_card: bg-card border border-neutral-800 rounded-lg p-6 hover:border-neutral-700 transition-colors

hero_bg.usage: Hero section background with heavy overlay or 'How It Works' feature image.

user_connecting.usage: Captive Portal success screen or Landing page 'User Experience' section.

preferences.hover: Scale 1.02 or Border brightness increase. No heavy movement.

accessibility.contrast_ratio: AA (4.5:1) for normal text, AAA (7:1) for critical data.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring (2px solid #2563EB) with offset.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures and noise overlays separate good from extraordinary.
Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
